title: Miss Merry Christmas Digs In
description: On pages 9–13, this part focuses on miss merry christmas digs in, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Miss Merry Christmas Digs In. Usopp and Chopper face Mr. 4 and Miss Merry Christmas, turning fear and teamwork into a real battle. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Lassoo
dialogue.text: Pay no mind to their numbers! Fiiiiirreee!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Merry Christmas
dialogue.text: I'm sorry... Even after all our efforts,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I'll stop it no matter how many times I'm knocked back to the ground!

summary: This part develops miss merry christmas digs in and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
